## TRM1.3. Additional time in terminal airspace (PI#6)

Dublin is the only Irish airport subject to the monitoring of this indicator. The additional time in 2025 increased to 3.98 min/arr, above the 2024 value -- last year of RP3 -- of 3.46 min/arr (*using the new methodology*). This represents a 15% increment and results in the second highest additional time in terminal airspace of states included in RP4.

The average for RP4 airports subject to monitoring of this indicator across Member States in 2025 was 2.98 min/arr.
